fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies that data synchronization can occur while users perform related tasks.

fields.name: Last Sync Date Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date/time that the Exchange server was synchronized.

fields.name: Folder ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the public folder on the Exchange server that you want to use for your queue and storage folders.
